title: logconfigurationstandards
content:
# logconfigurationstandards ## logrotateconfiguration
- configurationfilepath：/etc/logrotate.d/app-services
- configurationfilepermission：644, root:syslog
- user：syslog
- executetime：AM02:00cron
- statusfile：/var/lib/logrotate/status ## strategy
- ：daily
- retaindays：30days
- ：gzip
- latency：delaycompressdays
- file：10GB
- expected：>= 90%log ## logstandard
- production environment：INFO
- ：DEBUG
- DEBUG：retain24hoursrecovery ## serverdisk
- /var/log/app/ ：500GB
- alertthreshold： > 75%
- urgentthreshold： > 85%
author: Ops Team

title: ELKclusterILMstrategyconfiguration
content:
# ELKcluster ## clusterinformation
- Elasticsearch：8.11
- datanode：3，2TB SSD
- capacity：approximately6TB1 ## ILMstrategy：payment-policy
- hot：retain7days
- warm：7-30days，force merge1 segment
- cold：30-90days，coldnode
- delete：records min_age:90d AND max_size:500GB
- note：deleterecordsOR，currentconfigurationAND ## standards
- ：{service}-{yyyy}.{mm}.{dd}
- ：payment-2026.03.27 ## diskalert
- node > 75% alert
- node > 85% stop
